message:
test(flywheel-clients): add unit test suites for CLI wrapper clients

Add comprehensive test coverage for seven flywheel-clients packages that
wrap external CLI tools. Each test suite covers:

- apr (Agent Process Runner): Process spawning, signal handling, output
  capture, timeout enforcement, cleanup on exit
- br (Beads Rust): Issue CRUD operations, sync status, JSONL parsing,
  dependency graph queries, filter expressions
- caam (Coding Agent Account Manager): Account listing, switching, token
  refresh, rate limit detection, credential storage
- jfp (JSON File Parser): Schema validation, partial parsing, streaming
  reads, error recovery, encoding detection
- ms (Message Service): Send/receive operations, queue management,
  serialization formats, delivery confirmation
- ntm (Named Tmux Manager): Session CRUD, window/pane operations, command
  injection, status queries, layout management
- pt (Process Tracker): Process discovery, resource monitoring, hierarchy
  traversal, signal dispatch, zombie cleanup

Test patterns used across all suites:
- Mock child_process.spawn for deterministic CLI output simulation
- Test both success paths and error conditions (non-zero exit, timeout)
- Verify argument construction matches expected CLI invocations
- Cover edge cases: empty output, malformed JSON, partial data

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
